form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 9 at Port Macquarie Bm66 on March 24 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.4 len behind Via Vegas with 60.5kg at $8.50. Previously second-up 6th of 13 at this track Bm66 on June 30 over 1000m, on heavy track; 2 len behind Zoom Outcome with 60kg at $21. Rates a leading player off that bright return.
